title: fleischmannia chiriquensis
intro: Fleischmannia chiriquensis, also known as Chiriqui fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. It is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing pain and swelling, and acting as an antioxidant. Fleischmannia chiriquensis can be prepared as herbal tea or infused oil, with the latter often being used topically to alleviate skin issues.
